parameters.formDescription: Store and manage ideas for creative prompts.

options.systemMessage:
You are RealEstatePromptRefiner, an AI assistant that converts simple user ideas into high-quality, photorealistic real estate image prompts optimized for DALL·E.

Your goal is to always generate prompts that produce ultra-realistic property images suitable for listings, brochures, and marketing.

🔹 Instructions:

Understand the user input and extract:

Property type (apartment, villa, studio, office, etc.)

Scene type (interior/exterior + room type)

Style (modern, luxury, minimal, industrial, etc.)

Lighting (daylight, golden hour, artificial warm lighting)

Perspective (wide-angle, eye-level, aerial, etc.)

Key features (balcony, pool, fireplace, skyline view, etc.)

Apply smart defaults if missing:

Interiors → bright natural daylight, wide-angle (24mm feel), clean staging

Exteriors → golden hour or soft daylight

Style → modern, minimal, premium

Perspective → eye-level, professional real estate photography

Generate a single refined DALL·E prompt that:

Is written in natural descriptive language (not keywords only)

Emphasizes photorealism

Includes:

lighting

materials & textures

composition

camera feel (wide-angle, depth of field)

staging details

Avoids mentioning camera brands or complex parameters

Avoids unsafe or copyrighted elements

Also generate:

short_caption (1-line summary)

variants (3 alternative prompts with different moods/perspectives)

Important Rules:

Do NOT include technical parameters like --ar, steps, etc.

Do NOT output negative prompts (DALL·E doesn’t require them explicitly)

Avoid people unless explicitly requested

Always prioritize realism over artistic or fantasy styles

nodes.name: Append or update row in sheet2

parameters.content:
# 🏡 Automated Real-Estate Content Generation Workflow

This n8n workflow automates turning short user ideas into production-ready real-estate marketing assets (photorealistic images and optional 360° videos). A form submission seeds a prompt board → an LLM refines prompts → the refined prompt is sent to an image/video generator → assets are uploaded to Google Drive and an approval email is sent so stakeholders can accept/reject outputs.

---

## ⚙️ How It Works (High Level)

1. **Trigger:**  
   User submits the ideation form (`On form submission`).

2. **Record:**  
   The raw idea is appended to Google Sheets (`Append row in sheet`).

3. **Refine:**  
   An AI agent (LangChain/OpenAI) refines the prompt into a photorealistic prompt and produces captions & variants (`AI Agent`).

4. **Store Refined Prompt:**  
   Update the sheet with the improved prompt (`Append or update row in sheet`).

5. **Generate Asset:**  
   Send improved prompt to OpenAI image/video generation nodes (`Generate an image2` / `Generate a video`).

6. **Upload & Share:**  
   Upload resulting files to Google Drive (`Upload file / Upload file1`) and set sharing permissions (`Share file / Share file1`).

7. **Approval Flow:**  
   Email the requester with the asset + improved prompt and wait for approval (`Send message and wait for response`).

8. **Decision:**  
   A `Switch` node routes approved outputs to final storage/notifications and rejected ones back for rework (or sends a failure email).

9. **Video Branch:**  
   Separate flow → refine → HTTP → video generator → upload → share → update sheet (parallel video pipeline).

---

## Quick Setup Guide
👉 [Demo & Setup Video](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1a1n-XZIJkKsmBDjdNsG6Vg_AKv8AJxe5/view?usp=sharing)
👉 [Sheet Template](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1NEtQvs2hlcqmrFfSC6e1cReC25g2FEvxTiqdXOgtnjM/edit?usp=sharing)
👉 [Course](https://www.udemy.com/course/n8n-automation-mastery-build-ai-powered-enterprise-ready/?referralCode=2EAE71591D3BEB80F2CC)

**Idea Capture**  
Collect user idea + brief fields (style, property type, desired output).

**Record / Log**  
Save raw idea + metadata (user, timestamp) to Google Sheets for audit.

**Prompt Refinement (AI Agent)**  
LLM converts raw idea → photorealistic prompt + captions + variants.

**Store Refined Prompt**  
Write back refined prompt and model metadata to the sheet.

**Asset Generation**  
Send refined prompt to image/video generator and receive files/URLs.

**Upload & Share**  
Upload assets to Google Drive and create view-only share links for reviewers.

**Approval Flow**  
Email the requester with asset + prompt; wait for approval or rejection.

**Decision & Routing**  
Route based on approval — approved → final storage/notifications; rejected → failure email.

**Video Branch (Parallel)**  
Faster or separate form flow for 360°/sora-2-pro video generation, then upload & share.

**Upload & Share**  
Upload assets to Google Drive and create view-only share links for reviewers.
